title: Document Additional Layer Storage (ALS) “API”
body:
Recently, I've been working on improving the[NyDus-Storage-plugin](https://github.com/containers/nydus-storage-plugin) ，which provides support for podman to use nydus format images with the feature of additional layer store(ALS).

But, after read the following issues and blogs, I still can't understand how it works

https://medium.com/@mohit2501tyagi/lets-walk-through-podman-37636cf223c5
[containers/image#1109](https://github.com/containers/image/pull/1109)
[containers/storage#795](https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/795)

so could the community provide some notes or blogs about the working principle of the additional layer store ?

thanks a lot !!

comments.body:
@ktock  Can I get your help with this? 

thanks a lot!!!
